c.d: The ease with which users can navigate and use the app's editing tools and features
Availability of varied editing options such as cropping, resizing, filters, selective adjustments, healing tools, and layering
Quantity and uniqueness of photo effects and artistic filters available, including trippy or painterly styles
Support for both iOS and Android devices
Whether the app is free, freemium, or paid subscription; including one-time purchase fees
Inclusion of AI-powered editing tools like automatic suggestions, object removal, and machine learning enhancements
Availability of templates, collages, and graphic design elements for composite creations
